div.div:
• Hook runs automatically on git commit
• Docker image: ghcr.io/ministryofjustice/devsecops-hooks:v2.0.0
• Default: Scans staged files (local pre-commit mode)
• CI_MODE: Enables CI scanning (filesystem or deep)
• GitLeaks v8.30.1 for secret detection
• Scripts: gitleaks.sh, git.sh, npm.sh, scan.sh
• fail_fast=false: Allows other hooks to run
• Exit code 0=success, 1=failure

switch.text: • Hook runs automatically on git commit...
